summary: Large mnname decomp/matching PR. It added many implementations and partial improvements in src/melee/mn/mnname.c, updated mnname.h and gmmain_lib.h prototypes, and split mnName data symbols in config/GALE01/symbols.txt. The only discussion evidence is the bot report, which records +3956 matched-code bytes, 11 new matches, and 14 unmatched-item improvements in main/melee/mn/mnname.

key_files.role: Primary decomp source file; added implementations and matching work for mnname functions, includes, extern data declarations, helper structs, name sorting, deletion, input handling, and menu/UI routines.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: mnname.c include and extern additions; implementations for CompareNameStrings, DeleteName, mnName_SortNames, mnName_80237D94, mnName_ConfirmNameDeleteInput, mnName_MainInput
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report lists mnname new matches and improvements

key_files.role: Header prototype cleanup for recovered mnname signatures and MnName_GObj layout.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: added MnName_GObj.text2; changed CompareNameStrings, IsNameUnique, DeleteName, mnName_SortNames, mnName_80237D94, and multiple later prototypes from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to typed signatures

key_files.role: Supporting header signature update for gmMainLib_8015DBF4 used from mnname deletion flow.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: gmMainLib_8015DBF4 changed from UNK_RET gmMainLib_8015DBF4(UNK_PARAMS) to UNK_RET gmMainLib_8015DBF4(s32)

key_files.role: Symbol metadata split for mnName .data region around 0x803ED618.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: mnName_803ED618 size reduced from 0x440 to 0x18 and new symbols mnName_803ED630, mnName_803ED644, mnName_803ED650, mnName_803ED668, mnName_803ED672 added

what_changed.text: Implemented or improved many mnname functions, replacing several placeholder comments such as CompareNameStrings, DeleteName, mnName_SortNames, mnName_80237D94, mnName_ConfirmNameDeleteInput, and mnName_MainInput with C bodies.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: mnname.c placeholder removals and added function bodies
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report lists 11 new matches and 14 improvements

what_changed.text: Removed a local opt_common_subs pragma wrapper around mnName_8023749C while adjusting locals and loop expression shape enough for the bot to report that function as 100% matched.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: deleted #pragma push, #pragma opt_common_subs off, #pragma pop around mnName_8023749C

what_changed.text: Added local helper and data declarations such as GetNameCount_noinline, GetNumNameList, checkStringRest, mnName_NameDisplayOrder, MnNameArchive, and multiple mnName externs.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: mnname.c top-of-file additions and helper definitions

what_changed.text: Updated mnname.h with typed prototypes for recovered functions and added a text2 field to MnName_GObj.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: mnname.h prototype and struct changes

what_changed.text: Updated gmMainLib_8015DBF4 prototype to accept an s32 argument, matching the mnname callsite added in deletion input handling.
Split a broad mnName_803ED618 .data symbol into a smaller object plus several string/object symbols.

smart_moves.text: Header updates followed recovered body evidence instead of leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS in mnname.h for functions that now have concrete argument and return types.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: mnname.h changes from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to typed prototypes

smart_moves.text: The PR paired source implementations with a bot-reported match ledger, giving narrow evidence for which functions fully matched and which only improved.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: decomp-dev bot report with 11 new matches and 14 improvements

smart_moves.text: A local data-order array, mnName_NameDisplayOrder, made name display sorting state explicit in source.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a function body proves signatures, update the owning header in the same PR so downstream callsites stop depending on UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: mnname.h typed prototypes added for CompareNameStrings, IsNameUnique, DeleteName, mnName_SortNames, mnName_80237D94 and others

decomp_lessons.lesson: Do not infer that a partial implementation is fully matched just because it was added in a large decomp PR; use the bot ledger to separate 100% matches from score improvements.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: 11 new matches listed separately from 14 improvements in unmatched items

decomp_lessons.lesson: Data symbol splits may accompany code-matching work when source needs more precise externs, but the PR evidence here only supports recording the metadata change, not a broader naming or data-ownership rule.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: mnName_803ED618 split into smaller object plus string/data symbols

naming_conventions.name: Address-style names retained for uncertain functions/data
evidence_refs: diff.diff: retained address-style function and data names throughout mnname.c and mnname.h
naming_conventions.note: The PR does not provide review or body text explaining semantics for these symbols, so address-style names should not be upgraded from this evidence alone.

naming_conventions.name: Semantic names used for clearer recovered helpers and state
evidence_refs: diff.diff: helper and struct declarations in mnname.c
naming_conventions.note: Some helper names are descriptive, but the PR gives no human rationale for exact naming choices.

naming_conventions.name: Header prototypes use typed parameters where recovered
naming_conventions.note: This aligns with the loaded truthful-headers-and-includes standard.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.description: mnName_8023749C no longer uses #pragma opt_common_subs off; local variable and loop shape changes accompany a bot-reported 100% match.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: deleted pragma wrapper around mnName_8023749C
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The PR does not state which exact source edit removed the need for the pragma.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.description: PAD_STACK appears in added mnname routines such as mnName_80237D94, mnName_ConfirmNameDeleteInput, and mnName_MainInput.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: PAD_STACK(0x20) in mnName_ConfirmNameDeleteInput and mnName_MainInput
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: No human review or objdiff details explain why padding was required; only the bot score report is available.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.description: A static GetNameCount_noinline wrapper was added and used in mnName_MainInput's name-list-full branch.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The name suggests an inlining/codegen tactic, but intent is not documented in PR text.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.description: The symbols file splits mnName_803ED618's former 0x440 object into a 0x18 object plus several string/object entries.
evidence_refs: diff.diff: symbols.txt hunk for mnName_803ED618 through mnName_803ED672
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The PR evidence shows the split and a small .data score improvement, not broader data ownership rationale.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: GALE01 report: matched code 60.49% (+0.10%, +3956 bytes); 11 new matches and 14 improvements in unmatched items, all reported for main/melee/mn/mnname.
No review comments or human issue discussion were present in the loaded PR slice.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: only PR body and bot issue comment

follow_up_queries: mnname.h UNK_RET UNK_PARAMS typed prototype cleanup

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR metadata, changed files, counts
raw_diff/diff_excerpt: source, header, and symbols changes
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report with match metrics
notes: No human reviews or review comments are present in the loaded slice.
The raw diff is truncated in the loaded file, though targeted lookup recovered the mnname.h hunk.
Bot report gives useful match/improvement evidence but no build command, objdiff details, or author rationale.
Several apparent matching tactics, including PAD_STACK and GetNameCount_noinline, are observable but not explained by PR comments.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Separate bot-reported new matches from partial improvements
accepted_candidate_records.text: For large decomp PRs, record exact bot report categories: PR 2352 had 11 new 100% matches and 14 improvements that remained unmatched, all in main/melee/mn/mnname.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recovered source signatures should be mirrored in headers
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2352 updated mnname.h and gmmain_lib.h prototypes alongside recovered mnname bodies, replacing several UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations with typed signatures.

source_update_candidates.title: mnname source owns name-list menu matching work
source_update_candidates.text: src/melee/mn/mnname.c is the source file for name-entry/name-list menu routines such as CompareNameStrings, DeleteName, mnName_SortNames, mnName_80237D94, mnName_ConfirmNameDeleteInput, and mnName_MainInput; PR 2352 added or improved these functions.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: bot report lists mnname functions
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful source path classification for future mnname matching searches.

source_update_candidates.title: mnname.h contains recovered mnname function prototypes and MnName_GObj layout
source_update_candidates.text: src/melee/mn/mnname.h declares mnname functions and the MnName_GObj struct; PR 2352 added a text2 field and replaced multiple unknown prototypes with typed signatures.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful header ownership fact; route for curator review rather than promoting directly.

source_update_candidates.title: GALE01 symbols file carries mnName data split metadata
source_update_candidates.text: config/GALE01/symbols.txt contains mnName .data symbol metadata; PR 2352 split mnName_803ED618 and added mnName_803ED630, mnName_803ED644, mnName_803ED650, mnName_803ED668, and mnName_803ED672.
source_update_candidates.reason: May help future data/symbol ownership searches, but the historical PR gives limited rationale.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that PAD_STACK or GetNameCount_noinline is generally recommended; this PR shows those tactics but does not document necessity.
Do not treat mnName_803ED618 symbol splitting as a global data-section standard from this PR alone.
Do not infer human reviewer acceptance reasoning; no human review comments were loaded.
Do not claim all added mnname functions fully matched; the bot report distinguishes new matches from partial improvements.
